narrative:
Benton Township has 719 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.7 percentage points.
